snapshots.note: Predates arXiv v3 and lacks stochastic-interpolants task files. Archive contains repository-tracked Git-LFS pointer objects rather than hydrated large LFS payloads.
Postdates arXiv v3 by more than one year and is not treated as the paper-time implementation. Archive contains repository-tracked Git-LFS pointer objects rather than hydrated large LFS payloads.

acquisition_method: Sparse git clone of official repository; history deepened to include initial release; git archive of exact PaperBench subtree at each commit; local static and computational inspection of released source, rubrics, expected labels, tests, and aggregate tables.
limitations: Not all Git-LFS payloads were hydrated. Complete paper-time agent attempts, executed submissions, raw judge predictions, disqualification records, and human-baseline artifacts were not released in the audited subtree. No paid judge calls or GPU reproductions were performed.
